最近、ローザさんを指名したいお客様がすごい増えてるんですよね。<br>こんなに急:
Recently, the number of customers requesting you has increased
dramatically. I didn't expect you to grow so quickly. Was there some kind of catalyst?
実は……お客様のことを司令官殿と思ってご奉仕するようにしたんです。:
Actually... I started serving customers by imagining them as
Commander.
司令官殿に気持ち良くなって、身も心もリフレッシュしてほしい……。<br>そう思っ:
I wanted Commander to feel good and refresh his body and mind... So
when I served with that intention, the customers became satisfied as well!
あらあら。本当に司令官君が好きなんですね♪: My, my. You really do love Commander, don't you?♪
そ、そそ、それは……！ ……それは、そうなんですけど～。<br>改めて言われると:
W-well...! ...Well, it's true, but... When you say it outright, I'm
embarrassed...
ふふっ、可愛いですね。<br>――あら？ 噂をすれば……: Fufu, how cute.—Oh? Speak of the devil...
し、司令官殿っ！？ い、いい、今の話、聞いてましたか……！？: C-Commander!? D-did you... hear what we were talking about...!?
話……？ いや、特に聞いてはいないが。<br>何かあったのか？: Talk...? No, I didn't really hear anything. Did something happen?
い、いえいえっ！ なんでもないですよっ！？<br>気にしないでください！: N-no, not at all! It's nothing! Please don't worry about it!
…………？ そうか？ なら、いいんだが。: ...? Is that right? Well, if you say so.
ローザさん。今日は十分人手が足りてるので、<br>接客は他の子に任せていいですよ:
Rosa, we have plenty of staff today, so feel free to let the other girls
handle the customers.
いいから、いいから。最近はあなたのおかげで稼がせてもらっているもの。<br>そろ:
Go on, go on. Thanks to you, we've been earning a lot recently. Isn't
it about time you got a reward?
彼のところに行っていいですよ。<br>空いている部屋も、好きに使ってくださいね♪: You may go to him. And feel free to use an empty room as you like!♪
そ、それは、あの……っ。<br>……はい。お言葉に甘えさせていただきます。: W-well, that is, um... Yes. I gratefully accept your offer.
ん？ どうした、ローザ。仕事はいいのか？: Hm? What's up, Rosa? What about work?
は、はい。それなのですが……よ、よろしければ、ですね。<br>わたしの上達ぶりを:
Y-yes. Actually... if you wouldn't mind, I'd like you to see how much
I've improved...?
上達ぶり……？ ……ああ、そういうことか。もちろん、いいぞ。<br>俺も、なんて:
Progress...? Ah, I see. Sure, I'm up for it. I mean... I wanted to do this
with you again too.
ほ、本当ですか……！？ で、では……精一杯、鍛錬の成果を<br>お見せしますので:
R-really!? Th-then... I will show you the very best of my training. So
please, guide me, Commander!
